subcategory: CTA section with animated dithering shader effect
use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS or AI-powered products
Marketing homepage with animated visual effects
Feature announcement or product launch pages
ai_summary: A dynamic hero CTA section featuring an animated dithering shader effect that responds to hover interactions. The component includes a pulsing AI badge, serif headline typography, and glass-morphic styling with rounded borders. Speed of the shader animation increases on hover, creating an engaging interactive experience suitable for tech-forward landing pages.
